description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered, off-white surface and visible rust stains along the rim and seams. The top of the barrel is covered by a loosely draped olive-green cloth, which hangs down over the edges, partially obscuring the upper section. The barrel features several warning symbols, including a flammable materials icon and a gas mask symbol, suggesting it is used for hazardous or industrial storage. The metal surface is matte with some grime and wear, indicating prolonged outdoor or industrial use. The barrel lacks visible handles or spouts, and its reinforced bands are typical of heavy-duty storage drums. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for robust containment in urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered metal barrel with rust stains, covered by an olive-green cloth and marked with hazardous material warning symbols.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flammable warning symbol and the cloth draped over the top.
description_view_1: Side view with the cloth hanging evenly and a partial view of a warning symbol.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible markings, just the cloth and the aged metal surface.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a gas mask warning symbol and the cloth cover.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: flammable symbol, gas mask symbol, warning text
